heading: Liability insurance
label: 558g Liability insurance
text: The Secretaries shall not require a cooperator or volunteer (as those terms are used in ) to have liability insurance to provide the volunteer services authorized under this Act.section 558e of this title
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , as amended generally by , , , known as the Volunteers in the National Forests and Public Lands Act, which enacted this section and sections 558a to 558f of this title.
